title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
Ellery deduces that Andrew Tewel, Megala's brother, is alive and living under the alias "old Pete," a mountaineer persona used to evade Croscos. Ellery concludes that Croscos killed Clinton and believes they must act secretly to reach the Tewel brothers' location before Croscos discovers Andrew's true identity. Megala agrees to assist, motivated by his brother's safety.

That night, Stephen Megalus refuses to stay with the Brad family, choosing instead to sleep on the yacht *Helen* anchored off Oyster Island. Under police supervision, Megalus drinks to calm his nerves before sleeping. The following morning, Officer Vaughn arrives at the yacht and takes Megalus to the Breedwood dock. In a highly visible operation, Megalus and Vaughn are escorted by police and state troopers on motorcycles in a procession toward New York. To ensure the security of the move, detectives and police cars are positioned to block all land exits from Bradwood, while a boat monitors the water in Kagim Bay.

Meanwhile, Professor Yardley remains at his house with a special investigator, Eliot Quine, to maintain a facade of normalcy. Ellery had secretly departed Yardley's house on Friday night, picking up District Attorney Isam and driving toward New York. After a brief, exhausted stop at the Sennett Hotel in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, the two men continue their journey toward Pittsburgh in Ellery's Duesenberg, arriving in the Pittsburgh area by 3:00 p.m. on Saturday.
